name: Alta Vista
description_short: Alta Vista Credit Union is a federally-insured credit union offering savings accounts, money market accounts, share certificates, and mortgage products with competitive rates.
description_long: Alta Vista Credit Union is a credit union headquartered in Redlands, California, with at least one branch located at 1425 W Lugonia Ave. As a credit union, it operates under NCUA (National Credit Union Administration) oversight and regulatory authority. The institution provides traditional retail banking products and services comparable to commercial banks, including deposit accounts, lending products, and investment vehicles. Alta Vista Credit Union offers a range of deposit and lending products including savings accounts, money market accounts, share certificates (CDs) with terms ranging from 3 months to 12 months, and mortgage loans. According to rate data from April 2026, their money market rates stood at 0.86%, savings rates at 0.10%, and 30-year fixed mortgage rates around 6.51%. As a credit union, membership requirements typically apply, though the website does not explicitly detail eligibility criteria. Alta Vista distinguishes itself through exceptional financial stability metrics. MonitorBankRates assigned it a 5.0 out of 5.0 star rating, an A+ Overall Health Grade (score 99/100), and a Texas Ratio of 1.97%—significantly lower than the national average of 6.13%. These metrics indicate very low non-performing assets relative to capital reserves, suggesting strong underwriting and loan portfolio quality. Potential members should note that the website indicates current rate availability data was not fully populated at the time of review, advising visitors to check back frequently or contact the institution directly for current offers. As a smaller regional credit union, product selection and branch availability may be more limited than larger national institutions. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
pros: Exceptional 5.0 out of 5.0 star safety rating from MonitorBankRates
A+ Overall Health Grade with score of 99/100, indicating exceptional financial stability
Texas Ratio of 1.97%, significantly lower than 6.13% national average, showing very low non-performing assets
NCUA-insured deposits, protecting member accounts up to standard insurance limits
Offers competitive deposit products including share certificates, money market accounts, and savings accounts
Provides mortgage lending with rates around 6.51% for 30-year fixed loans
Strong capitalization and loan loss reserves relative to asset quality
cons: Limited branch presence—only one Redlands, CA location confirmed on the website
Current rate information was not fully available at time of profile review, requiring members to check back or contact directly
No details provided about membership eligibility requirements or fee structure
Smaller regional credit union may offer fewer product options and digital banking features compared to national banks
Website does not display specific customer reviews or member satisfaction data
best_for: California residents in the Redlands area seeking NCUA-insured deposit accounts with strong institutional safety
Borrowers looking for mortgage financing from a financially stable credit union with excellent health metrics
Savers prioritizing institutional safety and stability over maximum interest rates on savings and money market products
diagnosis: Alta Vista Credit Union is best suited for depositors and borrowers in the Redlands, California area who prioritize institutional financial strength and safety above all else, as evidenced by its exceptional A+ health grade and low Texas Ratio. The main caveat is limited geographic accessibility (single branch confirmed) and the need to verify current rates and products directly with the institution, as the website's rate information was incomplete at the time of review.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_description: Federally-insured credit union offering savings accounts, money market accounts, share certificates, and mortgages.
